rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings.
Component names, ports, and connections must be sourced from the authoritative AADL model structure.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architectural integrity when inserting AGREE annexes.
Use only valid AADL scope references in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level bindings require placement in component implementation scopes.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports.
